faq_items.question: Why do I see this page?
faq_items.answer: You are seeing this page because the website owner uses Cloudflare to protect email addresses from automated harvesting. The original email address is obfuscated until you click the link to reveal it. For example, the address info@example.com will only be shown after you interact with the protection widget.

faq_items.question: How can I unblock my email address?
faq_items.answer: If you believe your email address has been blocked or is not displaying correctly, contact the site owner using any visible contact form. Provide details about which page you were on and what you were trying to do.

faq_items.question: How do I contact support if emails are hidden?
faq_items.answer: When email addresses are hidden, you can use the on-page forms or reveal a protected email to reach support. For instance, the address support@example.com might be shown only after you click the reveal link.

faq_items.question: Can I view this notice in another language?
faq_items.answer: Yes. Use the language selector at the top of the page to switch between English and Spanish. The FAQ section will reload in the selected language.

faq_items.question: ¿Por qué veo esta página?
faq_items.answer: Ves esta página porque el propietario del sitio usa Cloudflare para proteger las direcciones de correo electrónico frente a bots. La dirección original permanece oculta hasta que haces clic en el enlace para revelarla. Por ejemplo, la dirección ejemplo-correo@example.com solo se muestra después de que hagas clic en "Haga clic para ver el correo".

faq_items.question: ¿Cómo se configura la protección de correo?
faq_items.answer: La configuración de protección de correo se gestiona desde la pestaña de "Settings" del aviso. Allí puedes ajustar el nivel de protección contra bots y definir dominios permitidos.

faq_items.question: ¿Cómo contacto con soporte si no veo el correo?
faq_items.answer: Si las direcciones están protegidas, utiliza los formularios de contacto de la página o haz clic en el enlace para revelar el correo de soporte cuando esté disponible, como soporte@example.com.

faq_items.question: ¿Puedo cambiar el idioma del aviso?
faq_items.answer: Sí, puedes cambiar entre inglés y español usando el selector de idioma en la parte superior de la página.

help_articles.title: Contact form not working
help_articles.summary: Steps to take when the on-page contact form fails and how to reach us using an alternative email.
help_articles.content:
If the contact form on the email protection notice page is not working, try reloading the page or using a different browser. If the problem persists, you can still get in touch.

Alternative contact
-------------------
When forms fail, use our backup support email address instead of the protected form fields. After clicking the "Click to reveal email" link in the Alternative contact section, you will see the address backup-support@example.com, which you can copy and use in any email client.

Feedback
--------
At the bottom of this article, you can submit feedback and optionally provide an email address for follow-up.

help_articles.title: Alternative contact options
help_articles.summary: Learn about backup email addresses and regional contacts you can use when primary channels are unavailable.
help_articles.content: This article describes different alternative contact paths when primary emails or forms are unavailable. In some cases, a dedicated backup address such as alt-contact@example.com is provided for time-sensitive issues. Always ensure you reveal the protected email before attempting to copy it.

help_articles.title: General troubleshooting for protected emails
help_articles.summary: Common issues when viewing protected email addresses and how to solve them.
help_articles.content: If you are unable to reveal an email address, first ensure that JavaScript is enabled in your browser. Next, disable any aggressive content blockers that might interfere with Cloudflare scripts. If problems continue, try accessing the page from a different network or device.
